## Alpha Direct Insurance Co. Corporate Information: FAQ
What does Alpha Direct Insurance Co. do?
Alpha Direct Insurance Co. is a private company that has been in the industry for 14 years. The business currently specializes in Insurance area. Alpha Direct Insurance Co.'s headquarter is located at Gaborone, Southern District, BW. Register with SignalHire to connect with Alpha Direct Insurance Co. employees and management.
What is Alpha Direct Insurance Co.'s email format?
Alpha Direct Insurance Co. uses 6 email formats across its organization. The most common pattern is firstName-lastName (e.g., jane-doe@alphadirect.co.bw), used in approximately 52% of work addresses.
How large is Alpha Direct Insurance Co.'s staff?
Alpha Direct Insurance Co. currently employs over [100-200 people](https://www.signalhire.com/companies/alpha-direct-insurance-co/employees) from United States, Botswana, Zambia, South Africa, India, with a head office in Gaborone, Botswana.
## Data Privacy
![GDPR Icon](https://www.signalhire.co/seo/files/img/dataPrivacy/gdpr.svg)
### GDPR COMPLIANT
SignalHire complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). SignalHire follows GDPR requirements, including but not limited to rights of data subjects to access, correct, or delete their personal information and supports the right to be forgotten.
![CCPA Icon](https://www.signalhire.co/seo/files/img/dataPrivacy/ccpa.svg)
### CCPA COMPLIANT
SignalHire is CCPA-compliant and provides California residents the right to know, access, opt out, and request deletion of their personal data.
